tempest 0.1.0
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Package index

Core workflows

tempest_run()
Run the STORM pipeline
tempest_run_async()
Run STORM asynchronously (Shiny-friendly)
tempest_task()
Create a vitals Task for tempest
tempest_costorm_task()
Create a Co-STORM evaluation task using SimulatedUser
tempest_session()
Create a Co-STORM session
TempestSession
TempestSession
SimulatedUser
SimulatedUser
run_app()
Run the tempest Shiny chat application

Configuration and retrieval

tempest_config()
Create a STORM configuration
tempest_generate_personas()
Generate Expert Personas for a Topic
tempest_retriever()
Create a TempestRetriever
TempestRetriever
TempestRetriever
tempest_create_ragnar_store()
Create a ragnar store with tempest metadata schema
tempest_cache_clear()
Clear the Tempest cache
SourceStore
SourceStore (evidence ledger)

Evidence and reports

tempest_claims()
Return claims as a tibble
tempest_sources()
Return sources as a tibble
tempest_verify_claims()
Verify claim citations against their sources
tempest_report_md()
Assemble a Markdown report with footnotes
tempest_session_report_md()
Assemble a Markdown report from a Co-STORM session
tempest_suggest_questions()
Suggest follow-up research questions for a topic

Host app extension points

tempest_artifact_store() experimental
Create a Tempest artifact store adapter
tempest_memory_artifact_store() experimental
Create an in-memory Tempest artifact store
tempest_expert() experimental
Create a Co-STORM expert definition
tempest_shiny_store() experimental
Create a shared Tempest Shiny store
tempest_shiny_ui() experimental
Embed Tempest panels in a Shiny UI
tempest_shiny_server() experimental
Run embedded Tempest Shiny panels

Session persistence

tempest_session_snapshot() experimental
Snapshot a Co-STORM session
tempest_session_restore() experimental
Restore a Co-STORM session from a snapshot
tempest_session_save() experimental
Save a Co-STORM session bundle
tempest_session_resume()
Resume a saved Co-STORM session bundle

Progress events

tempest_progress_event() experimental
Create a Tempest progress event
tempest_progress_event_data()
Convert a Tempest progress event to a list
tempest_progress_collector() experimental
Create an in-memory Tempest progress event collector
tempest_progress_filter() experimental
Filter Tempest progress events
tempest_progress_replay() experimental
Replay Tempest progress events to a callback
tempest_progress_state() experimental
Reduce Tempest progress events to workflow state
tempest_progress_labels()
Progress labels for Tempest workflows

dsprrr modules

tempest_load_dsprrr_modules() experimental
Load compiled dsprrr modules
tempest_optimize_dsprrr_modules() experimental
Optimize STORM dsprrr modules
tempest_save_dsprrr_modules() experimental
Save compiled dsprrr modules

On this page

Developed by James Wade.
